title: Pallux's Outlined Wool
description: This Resource Pack for Minecraft 1.14 - 1.21 outlines Minecraft's Wools. Perfect for Bedwars or simple aesthetics.
body:
![Showing the title of the Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e50366752947ac6056bddebbaa88bbe58e2dbf5.png)

## Pallux's Outlined Wool Pack

This pack is creating a perfect setting for Minecraft Bedwars or simply for aesthetics. The Outlined Wool Pack looks clean and does not break the vanilla feeling.

The pack can perfectly be used in Modpacks or together with other Minecraft resource packs, as it's only overwriting vanilla Minecraft Wools, no other blocks.
